sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.default_value: Welcome to the era of Holistic Technology, where inner self meets outer beauty.

sub_fields.label: Subheading
sub_fields.name: subheading
sub_fields.default_value: How you feel on the inside is felt by the world, and seen on your skin.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.default_value: Liz & Rachel created Radical Skincare to solve their own skin challenges with no intention of selling it. Partnering with world-renowned  scientists, they mastered  the ability to put maximum levels of proven antioxidants and skin-calming agents in their youth elixir without irritating sensitive skin… instead it transformed it! Diving deeper they discovered a body mind connection that even effects your largest organ - your skin. Radical had to deliver  and nourish not just your skins needs but uplift the you within.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.default_value: You’ve tried the most expensive brands, the drug store brands, the celebrity endorsed brands and still no Radical Results. Your search is over! We wanted to make it easy for you to choose the right products for your skin concerns. Simply click on the skin concerns below to match with our recommended products designed specifically for YOU.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.default_value: Our commitment is to share with you the ingredients and the process needed to create your dreams. Just as there is a formula for creating amazing skincare products, there’s a formula for creating a life you love. You might just need a pound of passion, a cup of purpose, or a spoonful of focus. We know that we can change the complexion of your skin. Our real personal payoff will be to know that we have changed the complexion of your life.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.default_value: As an online shopper, brand partner, or brand partner customer, you can now earn points with every purchase, unlocking a world of benefits. Enjoy special discounts, freebies, and exclusive promotions designed just for you.
